Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Sew it! Knit it! And finally, weave it together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Say, {f 4 2}-dono! Could we go to the tea shop, Azuki Arai, together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It will be my first time going. Will you maybe, how do you say, show me the ropes?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}The flavors are simple but perfect. Japanese culture is so fascinating—omoshiroi![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}What a relief... I was afraid I might offend someone if I did not know the proper etiquette.[n]{f 1 1}
